title: Image To Image Retro Art Print Portrait Poster
sourceTitle: Image To Image Retro Art Print Portrait Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image retro art print portrait poster from fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish with concrete medium cues from the prompt, preserving direct gaze, dark wavy hair outline, seated cafe posture, hand holding coffee, and table-edge composition and night cafe street, woven chair, coffee glass, beige coat, and burgundy top. Subject: fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish with concrete medium cues from the prompt is the identity-safe portrait reference. Preserve the real facial expression, eye direction, facial proportions, hair outline, body posture, and subject recognizability. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Fixed 1:1 art poster composition: preserve the core source-photo structure, head angle, body posture, and main environment skeleton while adding cleaner negative space and an independent magazine-cover or exhibition-poster feel. Signature Elements: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Fixed source details: Source Photo: Image 1: retro cafe source portrait. Style: Retro art poster, editorial portrait poster, grain printed texture, risograph-inspired photo treatment, screen print grain, vintage magazine cover aesthetic, stylized photographic poster, light color blocking, simplified edges, strengthened outlines, halftone dots, ink bleed, color misregistration, and scanned magazine texture. Color Palette: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Lighting: Printed-photo lighting translated into flat poster color: preserve source face readability, simplify shadows into graphic planes, and add paper-grain brightness without destroying facial identity. Camera: Square art-print crop based on the uploaded photo, preserving head angle, gaze direction, body posture, and source composition while allowing slight poster-like cleanup of background spacing. Materials: Coarse paper grain, risograph grain, screen printing texture, halftone dots, slight ink bleeding, slight color misregistration, vintage print noise, and scanned magazine texture. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
